news.t: Analysts Predict 11% Gains Ahead For The First Trust NASDAQ-100-Technology Sector Index Fund ETF

holdings.infoBox: QTEC is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marvell Technology stock at 4.98%, Arm Holdings at 4.50%, Intel at 4.44%, Advanced Micro Devices at 3.97%, and Micron Technology at 3.63%.

overview.description: The First Trust NASDAQ-100 Technology Sector Index Fund (QTEC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the NASDAQ-100 Technology Sector index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of the largest Nasdaq-listed US technology stocks. QTEC was launched on Apr 19, 2006 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Analysts Predict 11% Gains Ahead For The First Trust NASDAQ-100-Technology Sector Index Fund ETF
data.text: For the First Trust NASDAQ-100-Technology Sector Index Fund ETF, we found that the implied analyst target price for the ETF based upon its underlying holdings is $87.46 per unit.
